email_subject: Application for Digital Performance & Insights Officer – Baver Ok
email_body:
Dear Brent and Silke,

I am writing to apply for the Digital Performance & Insights Officer position at Watkins Europe, as advertised via ITZU. With a background in digital marketing, SEO, and web management, I am excited about the opportunity to combine data analysis, platform optimization, and stakeholder coordination in a B2B environment.

In my current role at Episto, I manage on-page SEO, content publishing, and WordPress site builds for clients, using tools like Google Analytics, SEMrush, and Ahrefs to track performance and drive improvements. I have hands-on experience with CMS platforms and am comfortable with data analysis—I have used Power BI in academic projects and am eager to deepen that skill. My project mirook.com involved implementing structured data and running technical SEO/GEO audits, demonstrating my analytical and detail-oriented approach.

I am fluent in English, have a basic knowledge of Dutch (currently studying), and am based in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp. I am looking for a role where I can bring structure to digital platforms and use data to drive continuous improvement.

I would welcome the chance to discuss how my skills align with your needs. Thank you for your consideration.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Dear Brent and Silke,

I am excited to apply for the Digital Performance & Insights Officer position at Watkins Europe. Your description of a role that blends data analysis, platform management, and stakeholder coordination resonates strongly with my experience and career aspirations.

Currently, as a Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage on-page SEO, write keyword-targeted content, and build/maintain WordPress sites using Elementor and Astra. I regularly use Google Analytics, Search Console, SEMrush, and Ahrefs to track performance and inform optimization decisions. This hands-on work with digital platforms and data has prepared me to take on the platform management and analysis responsibilities outlined in your job description.

On my own project, mirook.com, I have implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema), entity optimization, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines. This required a detail-oriented, analytical approach—testing, auditing, and iterating to improve search health scores. I believe this mindset aligns well with your need for someone who can analyze usage data and translate insights into concrete actions.

While my professional experience is in digital marketing and web development, I am comfortable with data analysis tools and have used Power BI in academic contexts. I am eager to deepen my expertise in Power BI and Salesforce, which I understand are key tools for this role. I am also experienced in coordinating with external partners and managing content across platforms, skills I developed while maintaining client websites and collaborating with stakeholders.

I am fluent in English, have basic Dutch (A2, currently studying), and am based in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp. I am looking for a role where I can bring structure to digital platforms, use data to drive improvements, and collaborate with international teams.

Thank you for considering my application. I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my skills and enthusiasm can contribute to Watkins Europe.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
cv_highlights:
- Managed on-page SEO, content publishing, and WordPress site builds for clients at Episto, using analytics tools to track performance and drive improvements.
- Built and optimized a multi-page WordPress site (mirook.com) with structured data, entity markup, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve search visibility.
- Proficient in Google Analytics, Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, and Google Ads; comfortable with data analysis and reporting.
- Experienced in CMS platforms (WordPress, Elementor) and coordinating with external partners for updates and improvements.
- Fluent in English, with basic Dutch (A2, in progress) and a technical foundation in web design and digital marketing.
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and data analysis. At Episto, I manage on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and full-cycle WordPress site build and maintenance for client sites. On my own project (mirook.com) I have applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search engines. Comfortable with analytics tools (Google Analytics, Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs) and CMS platforms, with a growing interest in Power BI and Salesforce. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: A2, currently taking classes.

CORE SKILLS
- Digital platform management: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, CMS, website content management
- Data & analytics: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads, Power BI (academic use)
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (A2, in progress)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
